title: ExperienceFragment
description: V2.0 M2 · A knowledge fragment ingested via CLI (agent) or GUI (human). Classified by four dimensions + insight_type.

role.description: Dimension 1: who was I (completely open, seed table is autocomplete only)

insight_type.description: Dimension 4: type of learning. Semi-closed enum: 反直觉|方法验证|方法证伪|情绪复盘|关系观察|时机判断|原则提炼|纯好奇. New values require insightColors.ts update.

rawContent.description: Original raw text from ingest (preserved for future re-classification)

linked_methodologies.description: Atom IDs of related methodology atoms (semantic alignment product)

ingestModel.description: Model ID used for classification (GUI path only)

private.description: True for emotion retrospectives — hidden from default skill retrieval

lastAccessedAt.description: V2.x cognitive-evolution · ISO 8601 timestamp passively updated by atomsyn-cli when read/find hits this atom (throttled, only persisted to disk if last update was > 1h ago). Feeds confidence_decay calculation. Optional; absent fallbacks to createdAt.

supersededBy.description: V2.x cognitive-evolution · Single atom id that supersedes this one. When set, atom is read-only and read/find default-hides it (filter out in index).

supersedes.description: V2.x cognitive-evolution · Atom ids this atom supersedes (single-direction linked list, multiple ids supported when merging multiple atoms into one).

archivedAt.description: V2.x cognitive-evolution · ISO 8601 soft-delete timestamp. read/find default does not return; can be unset via atomsyn-cli archive --restore.

archivedReason.description: V2.x cognitive-evolution · Optional user-provided rationale captured when archiving.

imported.description: V2.x bootstrap-skill · True if this fragment was created by atomsyn-cli bootstrap during a batch import session.

bootstrap_session_id.description: V2.x bootstrap-skill · Source bootstrap session id when imported=true. Null otherwise.
